basic_details.job_title: NHM Maharashtra Project Co Ordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.post_name: Project Co Ordinator at DD Level
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission Maharashtra (NHM Maharashtra) has published the Project Co Ordinator at DD Level Recruitment 2026 Notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 contractual Project Co-Ordinator at DD Level position with a monthly salary of Rs. 50,000. Candidates up to 43 years of age possessing BE/ B.Tech, BCA/ MCA, MBA/ Post Graduate Diploma in Management, or a Master's in Public Health are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their offline applications on or before 24 July 2026. The official notification and application form are provided below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 43 years. Age Relaxation: Open category candidates are eligible up to 38 years, while reservation category candidates are eligible up to 43 years.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/ B.Tech, BCA/ MCA, MBA/ Post Graduate Diploma in Management, Master's in Public Health
qualification.details: BE/ B.Tech, Or BCA/ MCA Or MBA/ Post Graduate Diploma in Management. Or Master's in Public Health from a recognized institute.

selection_process: Qualifying Exam Marks Additional Qualification Marks Experience Marks Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NHM Maharashtra Project Co-Ordinator at DD Level Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.arogya.maharashtra.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NHM Maharashtra Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NHM Maharashtra Project Co-Ordinator at DD Level Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.arogya.maharashtra.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHM Maharashtra Project Co Ordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHM Maharashtra Project Co-Ordinator at DD Level recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the NHM Maharashtra Project Co-Ordinator at DD Level recruitment is 24th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Co-Ordinator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE/B.Tech, BCA/MCA, MBA/Post Graduate Diploma in Management, or a Master's in Public Health from a recognized institute to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Co-Ordinator at DD Level post is 43 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Co-Ordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000 per month for the Project Co-Ordinator at DD Level position.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NHM Maharashtra Project Co-Ordinator at DD Level recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies announced for the Project Co-Ordinator post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy announced for the Project Co-Ordinator at DD Level position under this recruitment drive by NHM Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve evaluation based on qualifying exam marks, additional qualification marks, experience marks, and a final interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 150, while SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 100.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of NHM Maharashtra, which is www.arogya.maharashtra.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Co-Ordinator at DD Level is a contractual role offered by the National Health Mission Maharashtra.
